allow: Bash(python3 -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\(r'C:\\unity-projects\\axiom-broken-sun-refined\\docs\\research-paper\\Chap 1-4 draft.pdf'\); pages = pdf.pages; print\(f'Total pages: {len\(pages\)}'\); [print\(f'--- Page {i+1} ---\\n{p.extract_text\(\)}'\) for i,p in enumerate\(pages[:8]\)]")
